'''Atresh Pikil''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] who was an acolyte of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Atresh Pikil was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] to use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Pikil was selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] and took up the rank of [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].<ref name="YDR" />

In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Padawan Pikil was stationed at the Temple and participated in the annual [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament|Apprentice Tournament]] overseen by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ilena Xan]]. During the competition, Pikil faced off against Padawan [[Gumbrak Hoxz]] in the first round. Apprentice [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy]], who was watching from the side-lines, thought that she wasn't a calculating fighter due to her overconfidence.<ref name="YDR" />
